headline: Eversource Takes a Hit as Regulators Reset ROE and Trigger Refund Risk
summary: Eversource Energy (NYSE:ES) has pulled back sharply in recent weeks, falling 11.51% over the past month to $67.44, even as the stock holds a 11.84% gain over the past year. Shares sit well below their 52-week high of $76.41, and the Street consensus target of $74.92 reflects a cautious but moderately constructive view. Into that ... Eversource Takes a Hit as Regulators Reset ROE and Trigger Refund Risk

headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on Eversource Energy, Lowers Price Target to $74
summary: UBS  analyst William Appicelli   maintains Eversource Energy (NYSE:ES) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $80 to $74.

headline: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on Eversource Energy, Lowers Price Target to $73
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Ross Fowler   maintains Eversource Energy (NYSE:ES) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $82 to $73.
